description.ko: 디지털 간섭과 선명한 색상 변화로 분해된 날카로운 기하학적 평면을 특징으로 하며, 미래 지향적인 디지털 경계를 정의하는 KURO-X의 하이테크 비주얼 아이덴티티입니다.
description.en: A high-tech visual identity for KURO-X, featuring sharp geometric planes disrupted by digital interference and vibrant chromatic shifts that define a futuristic digital frontier.

prompt: KURO-X branding concept, geometric glitch art style, sharp vector polygons, digital distortion artifacts, chromatic aberration, neon purple and electric cyan accents, minimalist black background, high-tech aesthetic, fragmented typography, 8k resolution, futuristic cybernetic design.
